# correios-logistica-reversa

> TypeScript client for Correios Logística Reversa SOAP (Brazil reverse logistics).

## Read first

- Full API + env vars + return shapes: docs/API.md
- Human quick start: README.md
- AI agent index: AGENTS.md

## Install

npm install correios-logistica-reversa

Requires Node.js >= 20. ESM + CJS. Types included.

## Required environment variables

CORREIOS_ENV=production|homologation
CORREIOS_USUARIO=
CORREIOS_SENHA=
CORREIOS_COD_ADMINISTRATIVO=
CORREIOS_CARTAO_POSTAGEM=
CORREIOS_NUMERO_CONTRATO=
CORREIOS_CNPJ=
CORREIOS_CODIGO_SERVICO=

Host app must populate process.env before loadConfigFromEnv(). Library does NOT load .env files.

## Minimal usage

import { CorreiosLogisticaReversaClient, loadConfigFromEnv } from 'correios-logistica-reversa';

const client = new CorreiosLogisticaReversaClient({ config: loadConfigFromEnv() });

const issue = await client.issueAuthorization({
  destinatario: { /* company receiving return */ },
  coleta: { ag: 15, remetente: { /* customer sending */ } },
});

import { isIssueSuccess, isCorreiosBusinessError } from 'correios-logistica-reversa';

if (isIssueSuccess(issue)) { /* numeroColeta is string */ }
else if (isCorreiosBusinessError(issue)) { /* codigoErro + descricaoErro */ }

await client.cancelOrder({ numeroPedido: issue.numeroColeta });

## Methods

issueAuthorization → solicitarPostagemReversa → IssueAuthorizationResult
trackByOrderNumber → acompanharPedido → TrackResult
trackByDate → acompanharPedidoPorData → TrackResult
cancelOrder → cancelarPedido → CancelOrderResult

## Domain

destinatario = company warehouse receiving the return
coleta.remetente = customer posting the package back
sms field only on remetente, not destinatario

## Errors

Validation errors: CorreiosValidationError (code VALIDATION_FAILED) — Zod input checks before SOAP
Business errors: returned in result.codigoErro (not thrown) — use isCorreiosBusinessError()
Transport errors: CorreiosTransportError with TRANSPORT_ERROR_CODES (WSDL_UNAUTHORIZED, SOAP_FAULT, etc.)
Config errors: CorreiosConfigError thrown on loadConfigFromEnv/validateConfig
